title: mayna laurina
intro: Mayna laurina, also known as Cat's Claw, is a woody vine native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mayna laurina include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Mayna laurina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy.
